page.title: Credit calculator
page.description: Calculate the monthly payment, rate, credit amount, or term from three known values.
page.lead: Choose what you want to find, fill in the other fields, and the result updates immediately. This version uses an annuity model: the monthly payment stays the same.

calculator.note: This is an estimate and does not include fees, insurance, early repayments, or lender-specific requirements.

principal.label: Credit amount
principal.hint: How much money you need to borrow.

errors.invalid-input: Fill all fields with positive numbers.
errors.payment-too-low: The payment is too low: it does not cover the debt or monthly interest.
errors.rate-out-of-range: The rate is outside the reasonable range for these values.
errors.term-out-of-range: Could not calculate a term for these values.
